subject: [PATCH v1 09/17] fuse: prepare to cache statx attributes from entry replies

2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch prepares the FUSE (Filesystem in Userspace) kernel module to cache statx attributes from entry replies by adding a new argument to the fuse_iget() function and passing it through to fuse_change_attributes_i(). This change is a prerequisite for a future patch that will add a new struct fuse_entry2_out outarg containing filled-out statx information. The existing callers of fuse_iget() pass NULL as the new argument, but this will be updated in subsequent patches.
